## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, `.vscdb`, or chat content committed
- [ ] Code that touches Cursor's DB is read-only or backup-first (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
